summary: Specified the reusable Site operational dashboard generator contract in `docs/product/site-operational-dashboard-generator.v0.md`. The artifact grounds the dashboard as a projection, not authority; defines snapshot, row, section, summary, row-provider, renderer, and freshness contracts; separates reusable Staccato mechanics from Staccato-specific providers; names default generic sections; and makes no-secret/no-mutation UI invariants explicit.

verification.command: Select-String -Path docs\product\site-operational-dashboard-generator.v0.md -Pattern "Site Operational Dashboard Generator v0|Reusable Staccato Mechanics|Core Data Contracts|Default Generic Sections|No-Secret Rule|Next Implementation Boundaries"

residuals: This task is specification-only; package implementation, Narada proper row providers, CLI generation, live server, and Site registry telemetry integration remain for later tasks.
Existing untracked `packages/site-operational-dashboard` material was not modified under this specification task.
